items.name_cn:
『Celine』
【Black】
Celin* BESACE Triomphe Shoulder Bag▪️
Exquisite small design, square retro shape, elegant yet casual, romantic and lazy vibe. Classic retro full leather design, versatile as always. The double-C Triomphe lock makes Celine fans go crazy! Clean and sharp lines, really cute. Full of aura, simply too eye-catching! The shoulder bag is slim and round, made of smooth calfskin, suitable for daily shopping or commuting.
Dimensions: Width 18cm x Height 16cm x Bottom 6cm
